query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyectoId = 1) AS total_items,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyectoId = 1 AND pinPlanoId IS NOT NULL) AS items_with_pin,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyectoId = 1 AND pinPlanoId IS NULL) AS items_without_pin,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plano_pines WHERE planoId IN (SELECT id FROM planos WHERE proyectoId = 1) AND activo = 1) AS standalone_pines
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyectoId = 1) AS total_items,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyectoId = 1 AND pinPlanoId IS NOT NULL) AS items_with_pin,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE proyectoId = 1 AND pinPlanoId IS NULL) AS items_without_pin,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plano_pines WHERE planoId IN (SELECT id FROM planos WHERE proyectoId = 1) AND activo = 1) AS standalone_pines
